text.div: • Import all the codes that are contained in https://cvc.canimmunize.ca/v3/ValueSet/Disease

name: CVCDisease
title: Canadian Vaccine Catalogue Vaccine Preventable Disease
description:
The [Vaccine Preventable Disease](https://cvc.canimmunize.ca/en/explore#/diseases) value set is defined by the Canadian Vaccine Catalogue.

  The Vaccine Preventable Disease subset is an extension of the Pan-Canadian Immunization Reference Sets Vaccine Preventable Disease Code subset developed by Canada Health Infoway.

This resource is an informative value set; the value set [can be downloaded via the CVC API](https://cvc.canimmunize.ca/docs/#/ValueSet/getDiseaseValueSet) and can be viewed on the [Canadian Vaccine Catalogue](https://cvc.canimmunize.ca/en/explore#/diseases) web page.
